chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: In this subchapter, “county” means Chambers County.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.251 — Definition

In this subchapter, “county” means Chambers County.

*Added by Acts 2005, 79th Leg., Ch. 538 (H.B.1044), Sec. 1, eff. June 17, 2005.*

subsections.text: In this subchapter, “county” means Chambers County.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2005, 79th Leg., Ch. 538 (H.B.1044), Sec. 1, eff. June 17, 2005.
